'''鈭歸-k-dh-s''' ('''kawakdhesoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:fibrize|fibrize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-k-dh-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fibrize|fibrize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歸-k-dh-s
|-
! Lemma
| kawakdhesoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwakdhesoko|thiwakdhesoko]] || [[word:jiwakdhesoko|jiwakdhesoko]] || [[word:shiwakdhesoko|shiwakdhesoko]] || [[word:kiwakdhesoko|kiwakdhesoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowakdhesoko|thowakdhesoko]] || [[word:jowakdhesoko|jowakdhesoko]] || [[word:showakdhesoko|showakdhesoko]] || [[word:kowakdhesoko|kowakdhesoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
